name: n8n
description: n8n is an extendable workflow automation tool. With a fair-code distribution model, n8n will always have visible source code, be available to self-host, and allow you to add your own custom functions, logic and apps. n8n's node-based approach makes it highly versatile, enabling you to connect anything to everything.
short_desc: Workflow Automation Tool. Alternative to Zapier
author: n8n.io

form_fields.label: Timezone
form_fields.hint: Timezone for workflows and cron triggers (e.g. Europe/Rome, America/New_York)

form_fields.label: Enable Diagnostics
form_fields.hint: Send anonymous usage data to n8n (true/false)

form_fields.label: Version Notifications
form_fields.hint: Show update notifications in the UI (true/false)

form_fields.label: Enable Templates
form_fields.hint: Show workflow templates in the UI (true/false)

form_fields.label: Allowed External Modules
form_fields.hint: External npm modules allowed in Code nodes. Use * for all, or comma-separated list (e.g. moment,lodash,axios)
